case_title: DUDUM, JACK J. vs. KATH, LIYA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUDUM, JACK J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KATH, LIYA CESPEDES, ENCARNACION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 571 MISSION ST, 1ST FLOOR, LEASE FORFEITED
